name: Cajun Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sausage cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté the sausage, chicken, onions, bell pepper, and garlic until the sausage and chicken are browned.
2. Add water, salt, cayenne pepper, and bay leaves to the pan. Stir in the tomato paste.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil with the lid on.
4. Once boiling, add the shrimp and raw rice to the pan.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring every five minutes until the rice is cooked. Yield: 6-8 servings.
